userDefinedField.fieldValue: MW id 7 Not possible to have xccy with amortization in Markitwire
MW id 4 Not possible in VCON to have Amortizing deals
MW id 7.2 Not possible in VCON to have fixing calendar different than payment calendar
MW id 9 CSTM _DEAL OR mutual break status or clearing decision as Yes
Pay 2.3906% on fixed leg 16,000,000 Receive USD LIBOR 6M on floating leg 12,000,000 Expiry 25 feb 2017
No Jurisdiction.Does not Require Mandatory Clearing.Trade cannot be cleared.
